nexa.feat.ptt.4.title: Offline Mesh Bluetooth

nexa.feat.video.title: Live Video PTT

nexa.feat.video.1.title: Low Latency

nexa.feat.video.2.title: Multi-Viewer Support

nexa.feat.sos.title: Emergency SOS & GPS

nexa.feat.sos.2.title: Lone Worker Protection

nexa.feat.ai.title: AI Call Analytics

nexa.feat.ai.1.title: Auto-Transcription

nexa.feat.ai.2.title: Sentiment Analysis

nexa.pbx.title: NexaPBX Cloud Phone System
nexa.pbx.subtitle: A complete enterprise phone system in the cloud. Extensions, IVR, call routing, SIP trunks — no hardware required.
nexa.pbx.features.title: Everything You Need in a PBX
nexa.pbx.features.subtitle: From basic extensions to advanced call routing, NexaPBX handles it all.
nexa.pbx.feat.extensions.title: Unlimited Extensions
nexa.pbx.feat.extensions.desc: Create extensions for every employee. Each gets a personal softphone, voicemail, and call history.
nexa.pbx.feat.ivr.title: Auto-Attendant (IVR)
nexa.pbx.feat.ivr.desc: Professional multi-level IVR menus with custom greetings, time-based routing, and language selection.
nexa.pbx.feat.ringgroups.title: Ring Groups
nexa.pbx.feat.ringgroups.desc: Route incoming calls to groups of agents. Support ring-all, round-robin, and least-recent strategies.
nexa.pbx.feat.transfer.title: Call Transfer
nexa.pbx.feat.transfer.desc: Blind and attended transfer between extensions. Keep callers informed with hold music.
nexa.pbx.feat.trunks.title: SIP Trunks & PSTN
nexa.pbx.feat.trunks.desc: Connect to any SIP provider or local phone lines via GSM/FXO gateways.
nexa.pbx.feat.callback.title: Click-to-Call & Callback
nexa.pbx.feat.callback.desc: Initiate calls from the app or request automatic callbacks from the IVR queue.
nexa.pbx.feat.softphone.title: Built-in Softphone
nexa.pbx.feat.softphone.desc: Make and receive calls directly from the NexaLive app. No separate phone app needed.
nexa.pbx.feat.bypass.title: Works Where VoIP is Blocked
nexa.pbx.feat.bypass.desc: NexaBridge technology ensures your calls go through even in countries that block VoIP services.
nexa.pbx.feat.routing.title: Smart Call Routing
nexa.pbx.feat.routing.desc: Route calls based on time, caller ID, language, or custom rules. Never miss an important call.
nexa.pbx.feat.timeconditions.title: Time Conditions
nexa.pbx.feat.timeconditions.desc: Set business hours, holidays, and after-hours routing with automatic voicemail fallback.
nexa.pbx.feat.recording.title: Call Recording
nexa.pbx.feat.recording.desc: Record all calls automatically. Search, playback, and download recordings from the dashboard.
nexa.pbx.feat.cdr.title: Call Analytics (CDR)
nexa.pbx.feat.cdr.desc: Detailed call reports with duration, cost, quality metrics, and real-time dashboard.
nexa.pbx.bypass.title: Works Where VoIP is Blocked
nexa.pbx.bypass.subtitle: NexaBridge ensures your communications work in any environment.
nexa.pbx.bypass.point1: Automatic protocol detection and tunneling through restricted networks.
nexa.pbx.bypass.point2: Multiple fallback paths ensure 99.9% call completion rate worldwide.
nexa.pbx.bypass.point3: No manual configuration needed — NexaBridge handles everything automatically.
nexa.pbx.cta.title: Ready to Replace Your Old PBX?
nexa.pbx.cta.desc: Set up your cloud PBX in minutes. No hardware, no contracts, no limits.
nexa.pbx.how.title: How NexaPBX Works
nexa.pbx.how.subtitle: Three steps to a fully operational cloud phone system for your entire organization.
nexa.pbx.how.step1.title: Connect Your Lines
nexa.pbx.how.step1.desc: Bring your existing phone numbers or get new ones. Connect SIP trunks from any provider, or use our global NexaEdge network for instant activation.
nexa.pbx.how.step2.title: Configure Your System
nexa.pbx.how.step2.desc: Set up extensions, IVR menus, ring groups, and call routing from our visual dashboard. No technical expertise required — everything is drag-and-drop.
nexa.pbx.how.step3.title: Start Communicating
nexa.pbx.how.step3.desc: Your team starts making and receiving calls instantly from the NexaLive app on any device. Desktop, mobile, or web — all synced in real-time.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivr.title: IVR Builder & Smart Routing
nexa.pbx.detail.ivr.subtitle: Design professional call flows that guide callers to the right department every time.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.title: Visual IVR Builder
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.desc: Create multi-level interactive voice menus with our drag-and-drop builder. Guide callers through options, collect input, and route intelligently.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.p1: Multi-language greetings: record or upload custom messages in Arabic, English, or any language your callers need.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.p2: Time-based routing: automatically switch between business hours, after-hours, and holiday menus.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.p3: DTMF input collection: let callers enter account numbers, order IDs, or other data before connecting.
nexa.pbx.detail.ivrbuilder.p4: Callback queue: when all agents are busy, offer callers the option to receive a callback instead of waiting.
nexa.pbx.detail.routing.title: Intelligent Call Distribution
nexa.pbx.detail.routing.desc: Route incoming calls to the right person using rules that match your business logic — ensuring no call goes unanswered.
nexa.pbx.detail.routing.p1: Round-robin, least-busy, and ring-all strategies for fair workload distribution across your team.
nexa.pbx.detail.routing.p2: Skills-based routing: direct technical calls to engineers, billing calls to accounting, VIP callers to senior staff.
nexa.pbx.detail.routing.p3: Overflow rules: if a group doesn't answer within 30 seconds, automatically escalate to the next team or manager.
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.title: NexaBridge VoIP Bypass
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.desc: Your business calls must go through — regardless of network restrictions. NexaBridge ensures 99.9% call completion worldwide.
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.p1: Automatic protocol detection: NexaBridge tests multiple connection methods and selects the fastest available path.
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.p2: Encrypted tunneling through HTTPS, WebSocket, and proprietary protocols that appear as normal web traffic.
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.p3: Operates in countries where VoIP is restricted including UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman, and others — verified and tested.
nexa.pbx.detail.bypass.p4: Zero configuration: employees simply open NexaLive and calls work. No VPN or manual setup needed.
nexa.pbx.detail.analytics.title: Recording & Analytics
nexa.pbx.detail.analytics.subtitle: Every call is a data point. Track quality, performance, and costs in real-time.
nexa.pbx.detail.recording.title: Call Recording & Compliance
nexa.pbx.detail.recording.desc: Automatic recording of all calls with secure storage and easy retrieval for training, compliance, and quality assurance.
nexa.pbx.detail.recording.p1: Configurable recording rules: record all calls, only external calls, or specific extensions and ring groups.
nexa.pbx.detail.recording.p2: Searchable archive: find any recording by date, caller ID, extension, or call duration.
nexa.pbx.detail.recording.p3: Encrypted storage with role-based access — only authorized managers can listen to recordings.
nexa.pbx.detail.cdr.title: Real-Time Dashboard & CDR
nexa.pbx.detail.cdr.desc: Monitor your phone system performance with live dashboards showing call volumes, wait times, and agent productivity.
nexa.pbx.detail.cdr.p1: Live wallboard: see active calls, queue depth, average hold time, and agent availability at a glance.
nexa.pbx.detail.cdr.p2: Detailed call records with duration, cost tracking, quality scores, and caller satisfaction metrics.
nexa.pbx.detail.cdr.p3: Exportable reports in PDF and CSV for management review and regulatory compliance.
nexa.pbx.detail.erp.title: Integration & Deployment
nexa.pbx.detail.erp.subtitle: NexaPBX connects with your existing business systems and scales with your organization.
nexa.pbx.detail.erpint.title: ERP & CRM Integration
nexa.pbx.detail.erpint.desc: Connect NexaPBX to your business systems for click-to-call, automatic call logging, and caller identification.
nexa.pbx.detail.erpint.p1: TexaCore ERP native integration: caller pop-up shows customer name, balance, and recent orders before you pick up.
nexa.pbx.detail.erpint.p2: API and webhooks for integration with any CRM, helpdesk, or custom application your business uses.
nexa.pbx.detail.erpint.p3: Automatic call logging: every call is recorded in your CRM with duration, notes, and outcome.
nexa.pbx.detail.deploy.title: Flexible Deployment
nexa.pbx.detail.deploy.desc: Choose the deployment model that fits your security and compliance requirements.
nexa.pbx.detail.deploy.p1: Cloud-hosted: zero maintenance, automatic updates, and global redundancy across NexaEdge servers.
nexa.pbx.detail.deploy.p2: On-premise option: deploy NexaPBX on your own servers for maximum data sovereignty and control.
nexa.pbx.detail.deploy.p3: Hybrid mode: cloud for external calls, on-premise for internal — the best of both worlds.
nexa.ptt.title: Instant Team Communication
nexa.ptt.subtitle: Press and speak. Crystal clear HD audio reaches your entire team in milliseconds. No ringing, no waiting.
nexa.ptt.features.title: PTT Features
nexa.ptt.features.subtitle: Built for teams that need instant, reliable voice communication.
nexa.ptt.feat.hd.title: HD Audio
nexa.ptt.feat.hd.desc: NexaVoice proprietary codec delivers crystal clear voice quality in any network condition.
nexa.ptt.feat.global.title: Global Edge Network
nexa.ptt.feat.global.desc: 7 NexaEdge servers worldwide ensure sub-100ms latency everywhere.
nexa.ptt.feat.channels.title: Smart Channels
nexa.ptt.feat.channels.desc: Organize teams into channels. Join multiple channels, switch with one tap.
nexa.ptt.feat.priority.title: Priority Speaker
nexa.ptt.feat.priority.desc: Managers can override active transmissions for urgent announcements.
nexa.ptt.feat.history.title: Voice History
nexa.ptt.feat.history.desc: Every transmission is stored and replayable. Never miss a message.
nexa.ptt.feat.hardware.title: Hardware PTT Buttons
nexa.ptt.feat.hardware.desc: Works with dedicated PTT accessories, Bluetooth headsets, and wired earpieces.
nexa.ptt.feat.video.title: Video PTT
nexa.ptt.feat.video.desc: Swipe up to broadcast live video. World's first video push-to-talk.
nexa.ptt.feat.mesh.title: Offline Mesh
nexa.ptt.feat.mesh.desc: Continue communicating via Bluetooth mesh when internet is unavailable.
nexa.ptt.feat.encrypted.title: Encrypted Channels
nexa.ptt.feat.encrypted.desc: All voice transmissions are encrypted end-to-end with AES-256.
nexa.ptt.cta.title: Replace Your Radios with NexaPTT
nexa.ptt.cta.desc: Unlimited range, free for individuals, enterprise-ready.
nexa.ptt.detail.audio.title: NexaVoice Audio Engine
nexa.ptt.detail.audio.subtitle: Purpose-built audio technology for professional team communication.
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.title: NexaVoice HD Codec
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.desc: Our proprietary audio engine adapts in real-time to deliver crystal clear voice in any network condition — from 2G to 5G.
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.p1: Adaptive bitrate: automatically adjusts from 8kbps to 128kbps based on available bandwidth.
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.p2: AI-powered noise cancellation removes background noise from construction sites, vehicles, and crowded environments.
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.p3: Sub-200ms end-to-end latency — faster than traditional two-way radios.
nexa.ptt.detail.codec.p4: Automatic echo cancellation and voice activity detection for hands-free operation.
nexa.ptt.detail.video.title: Video Push-to-Talk
nexa.ptt.detail.video.desc: World's first video PTT system. Swipe up while transmitting to broadcast live video to your entire channel.
nexa.ptt.detail.video.p1: One-to-many live video broadcast — show what you see to your entire team instantly.
nexa.ptt.detail.video.p2: Automatic quality adjustment: 1080p on Wi-Fi, optimized for cellular in the field.
nexa.ptt.detail.video.p3: Video recordings are stored and can be replayed, annotated, and shared.
nexa.ptt.sos.title: SOS & Emergency System
nexa.ptt.sos.subtitle: Comprehensive emergency features designed to protect your team in critical situations.
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.title: Instant SOS Alerts
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.desc: One-touch emergency activation sends immediate alerts to all designated responders with full context.
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.p1: Dedicated SOS button — works even from lock screen or with screen off.
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.p2: Automatic audio recording begins immediately when SOS is triggered.
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.p3: Alerts include real-time GPS coordinates, battery level, and network status.
nexa.ptt.sos.alert.p4: Configurable escalation chain: if first responder doesn't acknowledge, alert escalates automatically.
nexa.ptt.sos.tracking.title: GPS Live Tracking
nexa.ptt.sos.tracking.desc: Real-time location tracking for field teams with full movement history.
nexa.ptt.sos.tracking.p1: Live map view showing all team members' positions updated every 5 seconds.
nexa.ptt.sos.tracking.p2: Geofencing: automatic alerts when team members enter or leave designated zones.
nexa.ptt.sos.tracking.p3: Movement history and route replay for incident investigation.
nexa.ptt.sos.loneworker.title: Lone Worker Protection
nexa.ptt.sos.loneworker.desc: Automated safety monitoring for employees working alone in hazardous environments.
nexa.ptt.sos.loneworker.p1: Timed check-in: if worker doesn't respond within set interval, automatic SOS is triggered.
nexa.ptt.sos.loneworker.p2: Man-down detection: uses accelerometer to detect falls or sudden impacts.
nexa.ptt.sos.loneworker.p3: No-movement alert: triggers if device remains stationary for too long.
nexa.ptt.sos.dispatcher.title: Dispatcher Console
nexa.ptt.sos.dispatcher.desc: Centralized command center for managing teams, alerts, and emergencies from a web dashboard.
nexa.ptt.sos.dispatcher.p1: Real-time overview of all active channels, team positions, and SOS alerts.
nexa.ptt.sos.dispatcher.p2: One-click broadcast to all channels or specific groups.
nexa.ptt.sos.dispatcher.p3: Full incident log with timestamps, audio recordings, and GPS data.
nexa.ptt.detail.channels.title: Channels & Offline Network
nexa.ptt.detail.channels.subtitle: Organize your teams and stay connected even without internet.
nexa.ptt.detail.groups.title: Smart Channel Management
nexa.ptt.detail.groups.desc: Organize your organization into logical communication groups with fine-grained access control.
nexa.ptt.detail.groups.p1: Unlimited channels per organization. Users can monitor multiple channels simultaneously.
nexa.ptt.detail.groups.p2: Priority levels: emergency channels always override normal channels.
nexa.ptt.detail.groups.p3: Temporary channels for ad-hoc teams — automatically expire after the mission.
nexa.ptt.detail.offline.title: Offline Bluetooth Mesh
nexa.ptt.detail.offline.desc: When internet is unavailable, NexaMesh creates a local Bluetooth network for continued communication.
nexa.ptt.detail.offline.p1: Automatic mesh formation — devices discover each other and create relay chains.
nexa.ptt.detail.offline.p2: Multi-hop routing extends range far beyond single Bluetooth connection.
nexa.ptt.detail.offline.p3: Messages queue locally and sync automatically when internet connection is restored.
nexa.msg.title: Secure Messaging, Zero Compromise
nexa.msg.subtitle: End-to-end encrypted messaging with file sharing, groups, and cross-platform sync.
nexa.msg.features.title: Messaging Features
nexa.msg.features.subtitle: Everything you need for secure team communication.
nexa.msg.feat.e2e.title: End-to-End Encryption
nexa.msg.feat.e2e.desc: Every message is encrypted before leaving your device. Nobody can read your messages — not even us.
nexa.msg.feat.groups.title: Group Conversations
nexa.msg.feat.groups.desc: Create groups for teams, projects, or departments. Admin controls and member management.
nexa.msg.feat.files.title: File Sharing
nexa.msg.feat.files.desc: Share documents, PDFs, and files securely. All attachments are encrypted in transit and at rest.
nexa.msg.feat.media.title: Photos & Media
nexa.msg.feat.media.desc: Send photos, videos, and voice messages with the same encryption protection.
nexa.msg.feat.search.title: Message Search
nexa.msg.feat.search.desc: Search through your message history locally on your device. Server never sees your content.
nexa.msg.feat.disappearing.title: Disappearing Messages
nexa.msg.feat.disappearing.desc: Set messages to auto-delete after a specified time. Extra privacy when needed.
nexa.msg.feat.notifications.title: Smart Notifications
nexa.msg.feat.notifications.desc: Priority-based notifications. Urgent messages always get through, routine ones can wait.
nexa.msg.feat.crossplatform.title: Cross-Platform
nexa.msg.feat.crossplatform.desc: Seamlessly sync across iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, and web.
nexa.msg.feat.sync.title: Real-Time Sync
nexa.msg.feat.sync.desc: Messages appear instantly across all your devices. Edit or delete from anywhere.
nexa.msg.enc.title: Multi-Layer Encryption
nexa.msg.enc.subtitle: Three layers of protection for your conversations.
nexa.msg.enc.point1: Messages are encrypted on your device before transmission using the Signal Protocol.
nexa.msg.enc.point2: Our servers never have access to your encryption keys or message content.
nexa.msg.enc.point3: Forward secrecy ensures past messages stay secure even if keys are compromised.
nexa.msg.enc.point4: Regular independent security audits verify our encryption implementation.
nexa.msg.cta.title: Start Messaging Securely
nexa.msg.cta.desc: Free encrypted messaging for individuals. Enterprise plans for teams.
nexa.msg.detail.protocol.title: Encryption Protocol & Architecture
nexa.msg.detail.protocol.subtitle: Understanding the technology that makes your messages truly private.
nexa.msg.detail.signal.title: Signal Protocol Implementation
nexa.msg.detail.signal.desc: NexaLive implements the Signal protocol — the same battle-tested encryption used by the world's most secure messengers, independently audited and open-source verified.
nexa.msg.detail.signal.p1: Double Ratchet algorithm: each message uses a unique encryption key, so compromising one message doesn't expose any others.
nexa.msg.detail.signal.p2: Forward secrecy: past messages remain encrypted even if your device is compromised in the future.
nexa.msg.detail.signal.p3: Keys are generated and stored exclusively on your device — they never leave your phone or computer.
nexa.msg.detail.signal.p4: Verified contact identity: QR code verification ensures you're communicating with the right person, not an impersonator.
nexa.msg.detail.storage.title: Encrypted Data Storage
nexa.msg.detail.storage.desc: Your messages and files are encrypted at rest on our servers. Even in the unlikely event of a server breach, your data remains completely unreadable.
nexa.msg.detail.storage.p1: AES-256 encryption at rest for all stored messages, files, and media on NexaEdge servers.
nexa.msg.detail.storage.p2: Automatic message expiration: set messages to self-destruct after a configurable time period.
nexa.msg.detail.storage.p3: Complete data deletion: when you delete a message, it's permanently removed from all servers — not just hidden.
nexa.msg.detail.team.title: Team Collaboration & Management
nexa.msg.detail.team.subtitle: Enterprise-grade team management without sacrificing security.
nexa.msg.detail.admin.title: Admin Controls & Compliance
nexa.msg.detail.admin.desc: Give IT administrators the tools they need to manage corporate messaging while maintaining end-to-end encryption.
nexa.msg.detail.admin.p1: User provisioning: automatically create accounts for new employees and revoke access when they leave.
nexa.msg.detail.admin.p2: Data retention policies: configure how long messages are stored to comply with industry regulations.
nexa.msg.detail.admin.p3: Audit logs: track account creation, device registration, and security events without accessing message content.
nexa.msg.detail.sync.title: Seamless Cross-Device Sync
nexa.msg.detail.sync.desc: Start a conversation on your phone, continue on your laptop, finish on your tablet — all in real-time with full message history.
nexa.msg.detail.sync.p1: Up to 5 devices per account, each with its own encryption keys for maximum security.
nexa.msg.detail.sync.p2: Offline-first: compose and read messages without internet. They sync automatically when you reconnect.
nexa.msg.detail.sync.p3: Supports iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, and web browser — with native apps for each platform.
nexa.sec.title: Security Without Compromise
nexa.sec.subtitle: Military-grade encryption protects every call, message, and file. Zero-knowledge architecture means we can't access your data — even if we wanted to.
nexa.sec.features.title: Security Architecture
nexa.sec.features.subtitle: Built from the ground up with security as the foundation.
nexa.sec.feat.e2e.title: End-to-End Encryption
nexa.sec.feat.e2e.desc: All communications encrypted with AES-256. Only sender and recipient can decrypt.
nexa.sec.feat.zero.title: Zero-Knowledge
nexa.sec.feat.zero.desc: Our servers never have access to your encryption keys or unencrypted data.
nexa.sec.feat.keys.title: On-Device Key Management
nexa.sec.feat.keys.desc: Encryption keys are generated and stored exclusively on your device.
nexa.sec.feat.infra.title: Secure Infrastructure
nexa.sec.feat.infra.desc: 7 NexaEdge servers in SOC 2 certified data centers worldwide.
nexa.sec.feat.auth.title: Biometric Authentication
nexa.sec.feat.auth.desc: Face ID, fingerprint, and PIN protection for app access.
nexa.sec.feat.bypass.title: Censorship Resistance

nexa.sec.detail.zk.title: Zero-Knowledge Architecture
nexa.sec.detail.zk.subtitle: We designed NexaLive so that we physically cannot access your data — even under legal compulsion.
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.title: How Zero-Knowledge Works
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.desc: Our servers relay encrypted data between devices but never have the ability to decrypt it. This isn't a policy — it's a mathematical guarantee.
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.p1: Messages are encrypted on your device using keys that exist only on your device. Our servers see only encrypted blobs.
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.p2: Voice and video calls use DTLS-SRTP encryption negotiated directly between devices — our servers only relay encrypted media.
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.p3: File transfers are encrypted with unique per-file keys. Even stored files on our CDN are unreadable without your device keys.
nexa.sec.detail.zkarch.p4: Account metadata is minimized: we don't store your contacts, call history, or message timestamps on our servers.
nexa.sec.detail.keymanage.title: On-Device Key Management
nexa.sec.detail.keymanage.desc: Encryption keys are generated, stored, and managed exclusively on your device — never uploaded to any server.
nexa.sec.detail.keymanage.p1: Identity keys are generated during registration using cryptographically secure random number generators.
nexa.sec.detail.keymanage.p2: Session keys rotate with every message using the Double Ratchet algorithm for forward and backward secrecy.
nexa.sec.detail.keymanage.p3: Key backup is optional and encrypted with a user-chosen passphrase before leaving the device.
nexa.sec.detail.compliance.title: Compliance & Certifications
nexa.sec.detail.compliance.subtitle: Meeting the strictest industry standards for data protection and privacy.
nexa.sec.detail.standards.title: Industry Standards
nexa.sec.detail.standards.desc: NexaLive meets and exceeds the security requirements of the most demanding industries worldwide.
nexa.sec.detail.standards.p1: GDPR compliant: full data subject rights including right to deletion, portability, and access across all EU data centers.
nexa.sec.detail.standards.p2: SOC 2 Type II certified: independent verification of security controls, availability, and confidentiality.
nexa.sec.detail.standards.p3: HIPAA compatible: encrypted communication suitable for healthcare providers handling protected health information.
nexa.sec.detail.audit.title: Security Audits & Transparency
nexa.sec.detail.audit.desc: Regular independent audits ensure our encryption implementation matches our security claims.
nexa.sec.detail.audit.p1: Annual penetration testing by independent security firms with published remediation timelines.
nexa.sec.detail.audit.p2: Vulnerability disclosure program: security researchers can report issues through our responsible disclosure process.
nexa.sec.detail.audit.p3: Transparency report published quarterly: disclosure of government requests and our responses.
nexa.mesh.title: NexaMesh: No Internet? No Problem.
nexa.mesh.subtitle: Communicate with nearby team members using Bluetooth mesh networking. No internet, no cell signal, no problem.
nexa.mesh.how.title: How NexaMesh Works
nexa.mesh.how.subtitle: Three simple steps to communicate without internet.
nexa.mesh.step1.title: Discover
nexa.mesh.step1.desc: NexaLive automatically discovers nearby devices using Bluetooth Low Energy.
nexa.mesh.step2.title: Connect
nexa.mesh.step2.desc: Devices form a peer-to-peer mesh network. Each device acts as a relay node.
nexa.mesh.step3.title: Communicate
nexa.mesh.step3.desc: Send voice messages and texts through the mesh. Multi-hop extends the range.

nexa.mesh.use.emergency.desc: When cell towers are down after natural disasters or emergencies.

nexa.mesh.use.events.desc: Concerts, stadiums, and events where networks are overloaded.

nexa.mesh.detail.tech.title: Mesh Technology Deep Dive
nexa.mesh.detail.tech.subtitle: Understanding the technology that keeps your team connected without infrastructure.
nexa.mesh.detail.multihop.title: Multi-Hop Routing
nexa.mesh.detail.multihop.desc: Messages travel across multiple devices to reach their destination, extending range far beyond a single Bluetooth connection.
nexa.mesh.detail.multihop.p1: Automatic route discovery: the network finds the optimal path between any two devices in real-time.
nexa.mesh.detail.multihop.p2: Each hop extends range by ~100 meters. With 10 devices in chain, reach exceeds 1 kilometer.
nexa.mesh.detail.multihop.p3: Store-and-forward: if the destination is unreachable, messages queue and deliver when the recipient comes in range.
nexa.mesh.detail.healing.title: Self-Healing Network
nexa.mesh.detail.healing.desc: When devices leave or join the network, NexaMesh automatically reconfigures routes to maintain connectivity.
nexa.mesh.detail.healing.p1: If a relay device goes offline, traffic automatically reroutes through alternative paths within seconds.
nexa.mesh.detail.healing.p2: New devices joining the network are automatically discovered and integrated as potential relay nodes.
nexa.mesh.detail.healing.p3: Battery-aware routing: the network avoids routing through low-battery devices to prevent unexpected disconnections.
nexa.mesh.detail.scenarios.title: Real-World Scenarios
nexa.mesh.detail.scenarios.subtitle: Critical situations where NexaMesh makes the difference between connected and isolated.
nexa.mesh.detail.disaster.title: Disaster Recovery & Emergencies
nexa.mesh.detail.disaster.desc: When cell towers go down during natural disasters, NexaMesh ensures emergency teams maintain communication.
nexa.mesh.detail.disaster.p1: First responders maintain PTT communication when cellular infrastructure is destroyed or overloaded.
nexa.mesh.detail.disaster.p2: SOS alerts with GPS coordinates propagate through the mesh even without any internet connectivity.
nexa.mesh.detail.disaster.p3: All mesh communication remains encrypted — security is never compromised even in emergency mode.

nexa.mesh.detail.industrial.desc: Maintain team communication in environments where cellular signals cannot penetrate.
nexa.mesh.detail.industrial.p1: Underground mines, tunnels, and basements where no cellular signal exists.
nexa.mesh.detail.industrial.p2: Steel-reinforced concrete buildings that block radio signals — common in factories and warehouses.
nexa.mesh.detail.industrial.p3: Remote construction sites and oil fields with no cellular coverage for kilometers.

nexa.features.item_13.desc: Sistem de telefonie cloud la nivel de întreprindere — un PBX profesional cu IVR inteligent, distribuție automată a apelurilor (ACD), înregistrare a apelurilor și numere locale în peste 50 de țări.
nexa.features.item_14.desc: Comunicare vocală instantanee, ca un walkie-talkie, dar nelimitată — conectați-vă cu echipa dvs. oriunde în lume cu un singur buton și urmărire GPS în direct.
nexa.features.item_15.desc: Streaming video în direct de pe teren la centrul de control — vezi ce vede echipa ta în timp real cu criptare completă.
nexa.features.item_16.desc: Mesagerie instantanee criptată de la capăt la capăt — trimiteți texte, fotografii, fișiere și locații cu confidențialitate completă garantată.
nexa.features.item_17.desc: Criptare AES-256 de calitate militară cu arhitectură fără cunoștințe — nimeni nu vă poate accesa datele, nici măcar noi.
nexa.features.item_18.desc: Comunicare offline prin rețeaua Bluetooth Mesh — conectați-vă cu echipa chiar și în zone izolate fără infrastructură.
nexa.features.item_19.desc: Sistem complet de urgență cu alerte GPS instantanee — trimite semnal automat de primejdie cu locația exactă către centrul de control.
nexa.features.item_20.desc: AI care analizează toate comunicările echipei tale — transcriere automată, analiză a sentimentelor și rapoarte inteligente de performanță.
nexa.features.item_21.subtitle: PBX complet în cloud cu IVR inteligent, distribuție automată a apelurilor și numere locale în peste 50 de țări.
nexa.features.item_22.subtitle: Apăsare și vorbire instantanee cu urmărire GPS în direct și hărți în timp real. Perfect pentru echipele de teren.
nexa.features.item_23.subtitle: Criptare AES-256 end-to-end cu arhitectură fără cunoștințe — nimeni nu vă accesează datele, nici măcar noi.
nexa.features.item_24.subtitle: Conectează-te cu echipa ta chiar și în zone izolate fără infrastructură sau conexiune la internet.

nexa.showcase.item_1.title: O aplicație. Toate comunicațiile.
nexa.showcase.item_1.subtitle: Cloud PBX. Chat-uri criptate. Apăsați pentru a vorbi. Video live. Funcționează chiar și fără internet.
nexa.showcase.item_2.title: Funcționează fără internet
nexa.showcase.item_2.subtitle: Rețea locală Mesh prin Bluetooth. Comunicați în subsoluri, depozite și locații îndepărtate. Nu este nevoie de infrastructură.
nexa.showcase.item_3.title: Securitate de grad militar
nexa.showcase.item_3.subtitle: Protecție maximă construită pe trei straturi de criptare. Infrastructură fără încredere, care asigură că comunicațiile și datele dumneavoastră rămân complet rezistente la piratare.
nexa.showcase.item_4.title: Sistem Cloud PBX
nexa.showcase.item_4.subtitle: Un număr pentru afacerea dvs. cu IVR multilingv inteligent. Distribuție automată a apelurilor între departamente. Numere locale în peste 7 țări pentru prezență globală.
nexa.showcase.item_5.title: Push-to-Talk — instantaneu
nexa.showcase.item_5.subtitle: Comunicare vocală instantanee între echipe. Canale dedicate pe departament. Mai rapid decât un apel, mai rapid decât un mesaj.
nexa.showcase.item_6.title: Criptare end-to-end
nexa.showcase.item_6.subtitle: Fiecare apel, mesaj și fișier criptat cu AES-256. Nimeni nu vă poate accesa datele, nici măcar noi. Securitate de grad militar.
nexa.showcase.item_7.title: Streaming video live
nexa.showcase.item_7.subtitle: Video live din orice locație. Monitorizare de la distanță a site-ului. Partajarea ecranului în întâlniri. Documentați incidentele cu audio și video.
nexa.showcase.item_8.title: Sistem SOS de urgență
nexa.showcase.item_8.subtitle: Butonul de urgență trimite o alertă instantanee cu GPS întregii echipe. 3 niveluri: ajutor, pericol, medical. Protecție automată a lucrătorului singuratic.

nexa.hw.cta.readyTitle: Sunteți gata să vă modernizați comunicațiile?
nexa.hw.cta.readyDesc: Contactați-ne astăzi pentru o consultanță gratuită și prețuri pentru dispozitivele NexaLive adaptate afacerii dumneavoastră.
nexa.hw.features.title: Caracteristici tehnice principale
nexa.hw.features.subtitle: Dispozitive concepute special pentru a funcționa perfect cu sistemele NexaLive.
nexa.hw.models.title: Modele disponibile
nexa.hw.models.subtitle: Alegeți dispozitivul potrivit pentru dimensiunea afacerii și cerințele tehnice.
nexa.hw.compat.title: Compatibilitate și asistență tehnică
nexa.hw.phones.title: Telefoane profesionale de birou
nexa.hw.phones.subtitle: Telefoane IP avansate pentru birouri moderne, care combină sunetul de o claritate excepțională, o interfață intuitivă și conectivitate securizată cu NexaLive.
nexa.hw.phones.desc: Gama de telefoane de birou NexaLive este concepută pentru toate nivelurile de activitate — de la telefoane de recepție de bază până la telefoane executive cu ecrane tactile și camere video, asigurând comunicații profesionale neîntrerupte.
nexa.hw.phones.f1.title: Calitate vocală HD
nexa.hw.phones.f1.desc: Tehnologia vocală de înaltă definiție asigură apeluri clare, fără zgomot de fond sau ecou.
nexa.hw.phones.f2.title: Conectivitate wireless și prin cablu
nexa.hw.phones.f2.desc: Telefoane care acceptă Wi-Fi dual-band (2.4G/5G) sau cabluri Ethernet Gigabit.
nexa.hw.phones.f3.title: Apeluri video
nexa.hw.phones.f3.desc: Modele avansate cu camere integrate pentru întâlniri față în față direct de la biroul dumneavoastră.
nexa.hw.phones.f4.title: Suport Bluetooth
nexa.hw.phones.f4.desc: Asociați cu ușurință căștile wireless și bucurați-vă de libertate de mișcare în timpul apelurilor lungi.
nexa.hw.phones.f5.title: Ecrane interactive
nexa.hw.phones.f5.desc: Ecrane tactile color pentru navigare facilă în agendă, gestionarea apelurilor și monitorizarea liniilor (BLF).
nexa.hw.phones.m1.desc: Telefon de birou de bază, ideal pentru call-centere și stații de lucru ale angajaților.
nexa.hw.phones.m2.desc: Telefon profesional pentru manageri, cu mai multe taste de comandă rapidă (BLF).
nexa.hw.phones.m3.desc: Telefon video cu sistem Android pentru directori și conferințe vizuale.
nexa.hw.phones.m4.desc: Telefon fără fir DECT pentru libertate de mișcare în birouri și depozite.
nexa.hw.phones.c1: Configurare automată (Auto Provisioning) prin NexaLive Cloud
nexa.hw.phones.c2: Asistență completă pentru protocolul standard SIP (RFC3261)
nexa.hw.phones.c3: Asistență codec OPUS pentru audio de înaltă calitate în condiții dificile de rețea
nexa.hw.phones.c4: Criptare TLS și SRTP pentru apeluri complet securizate
nexa.hw.phones.c6: Compatibil cu agende telefonice centralizate (LDAP / XML)
nexa.hw.gw.title: Gateway-uri de telefonie pentru companii
nexa.hw.gw.subtitle: Conectați rețeaua telefonică tradițională (FXS/FXO) și rețelele mobile (SIM) cu NexaLive Cloud într-un mod simplu și fiabil.
nexa.hw.gw.desc: Gateway-urile NexaLive oferă o punte de legătură fiabilă între infrastructura analogică existentă și comunicațiile digitale moderne (VoIP), permițându-vă să folosiți funcțiile de PBX în cloud păstrând în același timp liniile actuale.
nexa.hw.gw.f1.title: Conversie perfectă (VoIP în analogic)
nexa.hw.gw.f1.desc: Conectați linii fixe tradiționale (FXO) și telefoane analogice (FXS) la sistemul PBX în cloud.
nexa.hw.gw.f2.title: Suport pentru cartele SIM mobile
nexa.hw.gw.f2.desc: Gateway-uri GSM/LTE pentru a utiliza numere de telefon mobil pentru a primi și a efectua apeluri prin PBX.
nexa.hw.gw.f3.title: Performanță stabilă ridicată
nexa.hw.gw.f3.desc: Procesoare puternice care garantează o calitate excelentă a vocii și latență redusă în conversia vocală.
nexa.hw.gw.f4.title: Criptare și securitate
nexa.hw.gw.f4.desc: Suport pentru protocoale de securitate (SRTP/TLS) pentru a proteja apelurile împotriva interceptării și ascultării.
nexa.hw.gw.f5.title: Management centralizat
nexa.hw.gw.f5.desc: Configurare și instalare de la distanță prin intermediul unei interfețe web simple, cu suport pentru Auto Provisioning.
nexa.hw.gw.m1.desc: Gateway analogic FXO cu 4 porturi pentru conectarea liniilor terestre.
nexa.hw.gw.m2.desc: Gateway analogic FXS cu 8 porturi pentru conectarea telefoanelor analogice și a faxurilor.
nexa.hw.gw.m3.desc: Gateway celular cu 4 SIM-uri pentru conectarea rețelelor mobile la PBX.
nexa.hw.gw.m4.desc: Gateway digital pentru linii PRI de mare capacitate destinate marilor companii.
nexa.hw.gw.c1: Complet compatibil cu NexaLive Cloud PBX
nexa.hw.gw.c3: Suport complet pentru sisteme open source (Asterisk, FreePBX, 3CX)
nexa.hw.gw.c5: Codecuri vocale: G.711, G.722, G.729A/B, OPUS
nexa.hw.gw.c6: Fax: Suport T.38 pentru o transmisie de încredere
nexa.hw.hs.title: Căști profesionale pentru birou
nexa.hw.hs.subtitle: Sporiți productivitatea echipei dumneavoastră cu căști Bluetooth și cu fir, concepute special pentru call-centere și echipe cloud.
nexa.hw.hs.desc: Căștile NexaLive oferă o calitate audio excepțională cu anulare avansată a zgomotului, asigurându-se că angajații rămân concentrați pe apeluri fără distragerea atenției de la mediul înconjurător, oferind confort pe parcursul întregii zile.
nexa.hw.hs.f1.title: Anularea activă a zgomotului (ANC)
nexa.hw.hs.f1.desc: Microfoane inteligente care izolează complet zgomotul de birou pentru o redare clară a vocii.
nexa.hw.hs.f2.title: Baterie de lungă durată
nexa.hw.hs.f2.desc: Căști wireless cu baterii care durează peste 15 ore de convorbire continuă.
nexa.hw.hs.f3.title: Wireless multi-dispozitiv
nexa.hw.hs.f3.desc: Tehnologie multipunct pentru a vă conecta simultan atât la computer, cât și la telefonul mobil, cu comutare fluidă.
nexa.hw.hs.f4.title: Design ergonomic
nexa.hw.hs.f4.desc: Pernițe pentru urechi din spumă cu memorie și design ușor pentru un confort de neegalat, chiar și în timpul utilizării intensive.
nexa.hw.hs.f5.title: Compatibilitate universală
nexa.hw.hs.f5.desc: Funcționează eficient cu telefoane IP, computere (USB) și aplicația mobilă NexaLive (Softphone).
nexa.hw.hs.m1.desc: Căști cu fir concepute pentru agenții de call-center.
nexa.hw.hs.m2.desc: Căști wireless Bluetooth cu o notă profesională pentru manageri și lucrători mobili.
nexa.hw.hs.m3.desc: Căști wireless stereofonice cu anulare activă a zgomotului pentru medii deschise și zgomotoase.
nexa.hw.hs.m4.desc: Căști in-ear True Wireless pentru directori.
nexa.hw.hs.c2: Funcționează perfect cu telefoanele IP NexaLive prin USB sau Bluetooth
nexa.hw.hs.c3: Certificat pentru platforme de videoconferință (Teams, Zoom, Meet)
nexa.hw.hs.c4: Protocoale de protecție împotriva șocurilor acustice acceptate
